functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Crab Field Guide
pages:
Crab Field Guide

A Choascraft guide for crab facts, beach behavior, digging, drops, food, buckets, swords, armor, and netherite upgrades.

Fact 1

Crabs are crustaceans with hard outer shells, jointed legs, and claws used for defense, feeding, and display.

Fact 2

Many crabs walk sideways because their legs bend best in that direction, though some can move forward too.

Fact 3

Real crabs molt as they grow. After shedding the old shell, the new shell hardens over time.

Fact 4

Crabs use gills. Many shore crabs can survive out of water for a while if their gills stay moist.

Choascraft Crabs

Crabs spawn on sand and red sand at beaches in groups of 2 to 4. About one in three natural crabs spawn as babies.

Behavior

Crabs walk, swim, return to land, idle, wander, and attack for 3 damage. They are small, but groups can be annoying.

Breeding

Crabs breed with tropical fish buckets. Babies grow faster when fed rotten flesh or tropical fish buckets.

Digging

Ready adult crabs are tempted by rotten flesh. Feed one rotten flesh on sand or red sand and it can dig up treasure. It needs about 30 seconds before digging again.

Buckets

Use a bucket on a crab to collect it as a Crab Bucket item. This is useful for moving crabs to beaches or pens.

Drops

Crabs can drop Crab Legs, Crab Claw, Crab Shell, Crab Eyes, and the rare Crab Orb.

Food

Crab Legs are edible. Cook them in a furnace, smoker, or campfire to make Steamed Crab Legs.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
C = Crab Claw
S = Crab Shell
O = Crab Orb
L = Crab Legs
E = Crab Eyes

Crab Sword

.C.
SIO
.L.

Result: Crab Sword

Result: Crab Helmet

Crab Boots

ISI
ISI

Netherite Crab Gear

Use a smithing table with a netherite upgrade template, crab gear, and a netherite ingot.

Beach Note

A crab with rotten flesh is a tiny prospector. Give it sand, time, and enough room to work.
